hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -qE '\.tsx?$' && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20 || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'gh pr create' || exit 0; echo 'Running test suite before PR creation...' >&2; RESULT=$(npm test 2>&1); if echo "$RESULT" | grep -qE 'Tests.*failed'; then FAILS=$(echo "$RESULT" | grep -E 'Test Files|Tests ' | tail -2); echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Tests failed — fix before creating PR:\n$FAILS\"}"; else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"additionalContext\": \"All tests passed — PR creation approved.\"}}"; fi
